system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tieuchuan_chatluong_getbydate","body":"
CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_TIEUCHUAN_CHATLUONG_GETBYDATE]
(
	@ngaythang date
)
AS
BEGIN
SELECT A.Id,
	A.ngay, 
	C.tieuchi, 
	C.tieuchuan, C.Id AS matieuchuan, 
	C.dungcu,
	D.dondathang, D.masp, D.mahtr, D.mact, D.tenct, D.nguyenlieu, 
	D.dayy_tc, D.rong_tc, D.dai_tc,
	A.manguoilam, A.CreatedBy, A.CreatedOn,
	A.congdoan, 
	A.ketqua, 
	soluongkiem = (A.soluongdat + A.soluongloi),
	A.soluongdat, A.soluongloi,
	C.ghichu,
	A.pallet_id, A.sauxuly, F.[Name] AS nguyennhan,
	A.soluongChiTietloi,
	A.TieuChuanLoi
INTO #BAOCAOLOI
FROM tr_tieuchuan_chatluong A
	INNER JOIN tr_tieuchuan_congdoan B ON A.tieuchuancongdoan = B.Id
	INNER JOIN tr_tieuchuan C ON B.tieuchuan = C.Id
	INNER JOIN tr_pallet D ON A.pallet_id = D.id
	LEFT JOIN tr_tieuchuan_nguyennhan F ON A.nguyennhan = F.Id
WHERE A.ngay = @ngaythang
ORDER BY D.masp, D.mact, C.stt

SELECT A.*, C.TenLoi, E.donhang AS donhangsudung
FROM #BAOCAOLOI A
	LEFT JOIN tr_tieuchuan_loi_detail B ON A.TieuChuanLoi = B.Id
	LEFT JOIN tr_tieuchuan_loi C ON B.DanhMucLoi = C.Id
	LEFT JOIN tr_tieuchuan D ON B.tieuchuan = D.Id
	LEFT JOIN tr_dondathang E ON A.dondathang = E.maddh

--SELECT c.tieuchuan,b.TenLoi, a.Id 
--FROM tr_tieuchuan_loi_detail a
--	INNER JOIN tr_tieuchuan_loi b on a.DanhMucLoi = b.Id
--	INNER JOIN tr_tieuchuan c on a.tieuchuan = c.Id

DROP TABLE #BAOCAOLOI;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_pallet","dbo.tr_tieuchuan","dbo.tr_tieuchuan_chatluong","dbo.tr_tieuchuan_congdoan","dbo.tr_tieuchuan_loi","dbo.tr_tieuchuan_loi_detail","dbo.tr_tieuchuan_nguyennhan"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
